title: Learn System Design
description: Master the fundamentals of system design including scalability, reliability, and maintainability patterns for modern distributed applications.

subgoals.title: Study Fundamentals
subgoals.description: Build a strong foundation in core computer science principles essential for system design, including networking, databases, and operating systems.

subgoals.title: Networking basics
subgoals.description: Understand TCP/IP protocols, HTTP/HTTPS, DNS resolution, load balancing concepts, and network security fundamentals.

subgoals.title: Distributed systems theory
subgoals.description: Learn about CAP theorem, consensus algorithms, distributed caching, sharding strategies, and fault tolerance mechanisms.

subgoals.title: Practice Architecture Patterns
subgoals.description: Hands-on experience with proven architectural patterns and design principles used by tech companies at scale.

subgoals.title: Design REST APIs
subgoals.description: Learn to design clean, scalable RESTful APIs with proper versioning, authentication, rate limiting, and documentation practices.

subgoals.title: Explore event-driven patterns
subgoals.description: Understand message queues, event sourcing, CQRS pattern, and how to build loosely coupled event-driven microservices.

subgoals.title: Implement Testing Strategies
subgoals.description: Develop comprehensive testing approaches covering unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end validation for robust software quality.

subgoals.title: Write unit tests
subgoals.description: Master unit testing with mocking, stubbing, and test isolation techniques to verify individual component behavior.

subgoals.title: Integration testing
subgoals.description: Learn to test interactions between components, API endpoints, and database operations in realistic scenarios.

title: Build a Web Application
description: Develop a production-ready web application from scratch, covering frontend, backend, and deployment aspects with modern best practices.

subgoals.title: Design User Interface
subgoals.description: Create intuitive, accessible user interfaces using modern frontend frameworks with responsive design principles.

subgoals.title: Responsive layouts
subgoals.description: Build fluid layouts that adapt seamlessly across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices using CSS Grid and Flexbox.

subgoals.title: State management
subgoals.description: Implement centralized state management patterns for complex application data flow and component synchronization.

subgoals.title: Backend Development
subgoals.description: Build robust server-side logic with proper authentication, authorization, and data management capabilities.

subgoals.title: Authentication systems
subgoals.description: Implement secure user authentication including OAuth, JWT tokens, session management, and password security best practices.

subgoals.title: Database design
subgoals.description: Design normalized database schemas, write efficient queries, and implement proper indexing for optimal performance.

subgoals.title: DevOps and Deployment
subgoals.description: Set up continuous integration, deployment pipelines, and infrastructure automation for reliable software delivery.

subgoals.title: Container orchestration
subgoals.description: Learn Docker containerization and Kubernetes orchestration for scalable, resilient application deployments.

subgoals.title: CI/CD pipelines
subgoals.description: Automate build, test, and deployment workflows using modern CI/CD tools and infrastructure as code practices.

title: Data Engineering Project
description: Build a comprehensive data pipeline for processing, transforming, and analyzing large-scale datasets with proper data quality controls.

subgoals.title: Data Ingestion
subgoals.description: Design and implement efficient data collection strategies from multiple sources including APIs, databases, and streaming feeds.

subgoals.title: Batch processing
subgoals.description: Implement high-throughput batch data processing jobs for handling large volumes of historical data efficiently.

subgoals.title: Stream processing
subgoals.description: Build real-time data streaming pipelines using Apache Kafka, Flink, or similar technologies for low-latency data processing.

subgoals.title: Data Transformation
subgoals.description: Create robust ETL processes that clean, normalize, and transform raw data into analytics-ready formats.

subgoals.title: Data cleaning
subgoals.description: Develop automated data quality checks, missing value handling, and outlier detection for maintaining data integrity.

subgoals.title: Schema evolution
subgoals.description: Handle changing data schemas gracefully with backward compatibility and migration strategies.

subgoals.title: Analytics Infrastructure
subgoals.description: Set up analytics platforms and data warehousing solutions for efficient querying and business intelligence reporting.

subgoals.title: Data warehousing
subgoals.description: Design star and snowflake schemas, implement slowly changing dimensions, and optimize warehouse performance.

subgoals.title: Query optimization
subgoals.description: Write efficient SQL queries, create appropriate indexes, and implement query caching for fast analytics.
